home.badge: A Proven Manufacturing Partner for Industrial and Construction Equipment
home.heroDesc: Welcome to the official website of KTECH.
home.qualityDesc: Built on proven manufacturing experience, we deliver trusted quality, OEM-ready technological advancement, and long-term partnerships backed by supply chain stability.
home.whyKtechDesc: Guided by the performance, durability, and safety demands of industrial and construction equipment applications,
home.whyKtechDesc2: we apply consistent standards across the entire process, from design and manufacturing to quality validation.
home.strength1Title: Proven Manufacturing Experience with Dual Operations in Korea and China
home.strength1Desc: With over 30 years of factory operation experience accumulated in Korea and China, we offer manufacturing capabilities that have been thoroughly validated in real production environments, supported by a stable and reliable supply system.
home.strength2Title: Reliability-Driven Quality Management for Core Components
home.strength2Desc: In key component areas such as wiper motors, fuel sensors, air compressors, siren amplifiers and lamps, wire harnesses and cables, which directly affect overall equipment reliability, we ensure consistent quality through our in-house quality management systems and verification processes.
home.strength3Title: Step-by-Step Technological Advancement Aligned with OEM Requirements
home.strength3Desc: Beyond supplying components, we strengthen our role as a technical partner by understanding equipment control architectures and system integration, while progressively enhancing our in-house design capabilities in electrical and electronic components.
home.strength4Title: Long-Term Partnership Focused on Supply Chain Stability
home.strength4Desc: Built upon consistent quality standards and a stable supply framework, we pursue customer-specific technological optimization aligned with each equipment and system environment, thereby establishing long-term, sustainable partnerships.
home.certDesc: We maintain a comprehensive quality management system covering design,
home.certDesc2: production, inspection, and maintenance in accordance with international quality standards.
home.ctaTitle: Looking for a Partner to Grow With?
home.ctaDesc: KTECH experts will propose the optimal solution tailored to your requirements.

aboutPage.heroSubtitle: A Manufacturing Partner for Core Components in Industrial and Construction Machinery
aboutPage.intro1Text: , KTECH has steadily grown as a trusted partner in the production and sourcing of key components for construction machinery and industrial vehicles, built upon a strong foundation of reliability and technical expertise.
aboutPage.intro2Highlight: 30 years of factory operation experience accumulated in Korea and China
aboutPage.intro2Text: , we have established fast and stable raw material outsourcing capabilities, supported by an efficient production and supply system. These strengths ensure consistent product quality while forming a solid competitive advantage in meeting the diverse needs of our customers.
aboutPage.intro3: In an increasingly competitive OEM market, we have consistently devoted our efforts to securing sustainable competitiveness in
aboutPage.intro3Highlight: quality, cost efficiency, and delivery reliability
aboutPage.intro3Text: . Across the entire process — from product development and design to sample production and certification testing — we deliver prompt and efficient results backed by decades of accumulated experience.
aboutPage.commitmentText1: To further enhance quality across all product lines and strengthen cost competitiveness, we continuously explore and implement new solutions and improvement initiatives. Guided by our accumulated expertise and a responsible quality management system, KTECH will continue to grow as
aboutPage.commitmentHighlight: a company trusted by its customers, while serving as a reliable partner responsible for the stability of our customers' supply chains
aboutPage.commitmentText3: Moving forward, we remain committed to our professionalism and strive to become the most trusted partner in the industrial and construction machinery components industry.
aboutPage.qualityDesc: We provide only the highest quality products to our customers through our rigorous quality management system.
aboutPage.technologyDesc: We lead the future of industry through continuous technology development and innovation.
aboutPage.trustDesc: We keep our promises to customers and build long-term partnerships.
aboutPage.ctaDesc: We provide optimal solutions with over 30 years of experience and technical expertise.

historyPage.presentEvent1: Development of various wiper motors and controllers
historyPage.presentEvent2: Established production systems for safety siren amplifiers and side bars (half bars)
historyPage.presentEvent3: Operation of Inno-Biz, ISO 14001, and ESG management systems
historyPage.year2019Event1: Developed compact-type air compressors — Enhanced performance and durability
historyPage.year2016Event1: Developed tankless-type air compressors — Applied lightweight and high-performance technologies
historyPage.year2013Event1: Changed company name from Kyeongbok Industrial to KTECH Co., Ltd.
historyPage.year2011Event1: Expanded and relocated headquarters — Strengthened manufacturing facilities and infrastructure
historyPage.year2011Event2: Commenced mass production and sales of electric and walk-behind carriers/tractors
historyPage.year2010Event2: Developed electric carriers/tractors and reach-type forklifts
historyPage.year2010Event3: Developed and began supplying air compressors (tank type) for construction machinery
historyPage.year2009Event1: Developed five electric pallet truck models and three manual pallet truck models
historyPage.year2009Event2: Developed electric hand trucks — Expanded material handling equipment lineup
historyPage.year2008Event1: Developed components for 20-ton and 14-ton wheel excavators
historyPage.year2008Event2: Developed control panels and electrical components for electric golf carts
historyPage.year2008Event3: Achieved ISO 9001:2000 certification — Established quality management system
historyPage.year2007Event1: Relocated the headquarters to Daedeok Industrial Complex, Daejeon, Korea (facility expansion)
historyPage.year2004Event1: Established Korean headquarters, Kyeongbok Industrial Co., Ltd.
historyPage.year2004Event2: Registered as an official supplier of Hyundai Heavy Industries
historyPage.year2004Event3: Developed and began supplying wiper motor kits for construction equipment — Localization of key construction machinery components achieved
historyPage.year1998Event1: Established Kyeongbok Electromechanical Co., Ltd. in Changzhou, Jiangsu Province, China
historyPage.year1998Event2: Began supplying wiring harnesses, work lamps, and switches for excavators to Hyundai Heavy Industries' China joint venture
historyPage.ctaDesc: Growing together with customers based on 30 years of experience and technology.

privacyPage.heroSubtitle: KTECH values and protects your personal information
privacyPage.intro: KTECH Co., Ltd. (hereinafter referred to as the 'Company') establishes and discloses the following Privacy Policy in accordance with the Personal Information Protection Act to protect the personal information of data subjects and to promptly and smoothly handle related grievances.
privacyPage.article1Desc: The Company processes personal information for the following purposes. The processed personal information will not be used for purposes other than those stated below, and if the purpose of use changes, necessary measures such as obtaining separate consent will be taken.
privacyPage.article1Item1: Responding to customer inquiries and consultations
privacyPage.article2Desc: The Company processes the following categories of personal information:
privacyPage.article2Item1: Required items: Name, company name, email, contact number
privacyPage.article2Item3: Automatically collected items: IP address, access date/time, browser information
privacyPage.article3Title: Article 3 (Retention and Use Period of Personal Information)
privacyPage.article3Desc: The Company processes and retains personal information within the retention and use period prescribed by law or within the retention and use period consented to by the data subject at the time of collection.
privacyPage.article3Item2: Records related to contracts or subscription withdrawal: 5 years
privacyPage.article3Item3: Records related to payment and supply of goods: 5 years
privacyPage.article3Item4: Records of consumer complaints or dispute resolution: 3 years
privacyPage.article4Title: Article 4 (Provision of Personal Information to Third Parties)
privacyPage.article4Desc: In principle, the Company processes personal information of data subjects within the scope of purposes specified in Article 1, and does not process beyond the original scope or provide to third parties without prior consent of the data subject.
privacyPage.article4Exception: However, exceptions may be made in the following cases:
privacyPage.article4Item1: When separate consent is obtained from the data subject
privacyPage.article4Item2: When there are special provisions in the law
privacyPage.article4Item3: When the data subject or their legal representative is unable to express their intention or prior consent cannot be obtained due to unknown address, etc., and it is clearly necessary for the urgent benefit of the life, body, or property of the data subject or third party
privacyPage.article5Desc: The Company currently does not outsource personal information processing to external parties. If outsourcing becomes necessary in the future, we will notify the data subject in advance of the outsourcing recipient and the outsourced work content, and obtain consent.
privacyPage.article6Title: Article 6 (Rights and Obligations of Data Subjects and How to Exercise Them)
privacyPage.article6Desc: Data subjects may exercise the following rights related to personal information protection against the Company at any time:
privacyPage.article6Item2: Request for correction if there are errors
privacyPage.article6Method: The above rights may be exercised against the Company in writing, by email, etc., and the Company will take action without delay.
privacyPage.article7Title: Article 7 (Procedures and Methods for Destruction of Personal Information)
privacyPage.article7Desc: The Company destroys personal information without delay when it becomes unnecessary, such as when the retention period has elapsed or the purpose of processing has been achieved.
privacyPage.article7Item1: Electronic file format: Completely deleted using technical methods that make recovery and reproduction impossible
privacyPage.article8Title: Article 8 (Measures to Ensure Safety of Personal Information)
privacyPage.article8Desc: The Company takes the following measures to ensure the safety of personal information:
privacyPage.article8Item1: Minimization and training of employees handling personal information
privacyPage.article8Item2: Restriction of access to personal information
privacyPage.article9Title: Article 9 (Installation, Operation, and Rejection of Cookies)
privacyPage.article9Desc: The Company uses 'cookies' to provide personalized services.
privacyPage.article9Item1: Purpose of using cookies: To understand user visit and usage patterns, and provide customized information
privacyPage.article9Item2: Installation, operation, and rejection of cookies: Cookies can be allowed/rejected through web browser option settings
privacyPage.article9Item3: Refusing to store cookies may cause difficulties in using personalized services.
privacyPage.article10Desc: The Company has designated a Personal Information Protection Officer as follows to be responsible for overall personal information processing and to handle complaints and damage relief of data subjects related to personal information processing.
privacyPage.article10ChinaAddress: No. 20 Zhenxing Road, Baizhang Industrial Park, Chunjiang Town, Xinbei District, Changzhou City, Jiangsu Province, China
privacyPage.article11Desc: Data subjects may apply for dispute resolution or consultation to the Personal Information Dispute Mediation Committee, Korea Internet & Security Agency Personal Information Infringement Report Center, etc. to obtain relief from damage caused by personal information infringement.
privacyPage.article12Desc: This Privacy Policy shall be effective from the effective date, and if there are additions, deletions, or corrections of changes according to laws and policies, they will be announced through notices 7 days before the implementation of the changes.

esgPage.heroSubtitle: Practicing structured environmental management based on ISO 14001 and responsibility-driven governance centered on ethics and compliance, we contribute to the creation of sustainable industrial value.
esgPage.policyDesc1: As a manufacturer and supplier of core components for construction and industrial machinery,
esgPage.policyDesc2: we practice structured ESG management based on our ISO 14001 Environmental Management System.
esgPage.policyDesc3: Under the direct responsibility of the CEO, we uphold environmental protection, workplace safety, and ethical compliance as core corporate values,
esgPage.policyDesc4: pursuing sustainable industrial ecosystems and trust-based growth.
esgPage.environmentSection1Desc: Based on ISO 14001 certification, we operate:
esgPage.environmentSection1Item1: Identification and management of environmental impacts
esgPage.environmentSection1Item2: Regular review of regulatory compliance obligations
esgPage.environmentSection1Item3: Environmental target setting and performance monitoring
esgPage.environmentSection1Item4: Internal audits and continuous improvement initiatives
esgPage.environmentSection2Item1: Reduction of energy consumption through process optimization
esgPage.environmentSection2Item2: Minimization of resource waste by lowering defect rates
esgPage.environmentSection2Item3: Hazardous substance control and review of alternative materials
esgPage.environmentSection2Item4: Waste segregation and recycling system operation
esgPage.environmentSection3Item2: Establishment and execution of improvement plans
esgPage.environmentSection3Item3: Consideration of environmental impact in facility investments
esgPage.socialSection1Item1: Regular safety training for all employees
esgPage.socialSection1Item2: Operation of safety management manuals for high-risk processes
esgPage.socialSection1Item3: Implementation of industrial accident prevention systems
esgPage.socialSection1Item4: Compliance with Occupational Safety and Health regulations
esgPage.socialSection2Title: 2. Fair Trade & Win-Win Partnership with Suppliers
esgPage.socialSection2Item3: Joint quality improvement and technical collaboration
esgPage.socialSection2Item4: Requirement of ethical and environmental compliance from partners
esgPage.socialSection3Item1: Prohibition of child and forced labor
esgPage.governanceSection1Item1: Zero tolerance for corruption, bribery, and improper solicitation
esgPage.governanceSection1Item3: Transparency in sales and contracting processes
esgPage.governanceSection3Item3: Execution of internal audits and corrective actions
esgPage.governanceSection3Item4: Reflection of key customers' ESG requirements
esgPage.supplierCodeDesc: We and our suppliers commit to the following principles:
esgPage.environmentDesc: Creating sustainable value through a systematic environmental management system based on ISO 14001.
esgPage.environmentItem2: Energy consumption reduction and resource efficiency
esgPage.environmentItem3: Waste segregation and recycling system operation
esgPage.environmentItem4: Internal audits and continuous improvement activities
esgPage.socialDesc: Fulfilling social responsibility through safety-focused management and fair partnerships.
esgPage.socialItem1: Regular safety training for all employees
esgPage.socialItem2: Fair trade and win-win partnership with suppliers
esgPage.governanceDesc: Building trust through transparent management and ethical corporate culture.
esgPage.governanceItem1: Zero tolerance for corruption, bribery, and improper solicitation
esgPage.governanceItem2: Accounting transparency and contract review processes
esgPage.governanceItem3: Prevention of conflicts of interest and business transparency
esgPage.ctaTitle: Learn More About Our ESG Management
esgPage.ctaDesc: Thank you for your interest in KTECH's sustainable management activities.

developmentPage.heroDesc: Based on the manufacturing experience and quality management capabilities accumulated in the production of wiper motor assemblies, air compressors, wiring harnesses, and cable assemblies for construction machinery and industrial vehicles, we plan to progressively enhance our in-house design capabilities and advance our technologies in the field of electrical and electronic components in response to evolving technological trends within the construction and industrial machinery sectors.
developmentPage.coreCapabilitiesDesc: Manufacturing experience and quality management capabilities accumulated in core component fields for construction machinery and industrial vehicles
developmentPage.wiperDesc: High-quality wiper system design and manufacturing for construction machinery and industrial vehicles
developmentPage.airCompressorDesc: Industrial compressed air systems and related component manufacturing
developmentPage.wiringDesc: Electrical cable assembly and custom harness production
developmentPage.futureDesc: To ensure the continued stability and reliability of our core products, we will establish and expand our internal certification and verification systems, while defining clear directions for the extension of our technical capabilities.
developmentPage.strategyDesc: We go beyond the role of a component supplier, and advance as a technical partner in equipment control and system integration.
developmentPage.strategy1Desc: Building upon stable quality and a consistent supply framework, we will pursue step-by-step technological advancements tailored to our customers' equipment and system environments, thereby fostering long-term and sustainable partnerships.
developmentPage.strategy2Desc: KTECH will continuously expand its technological capabilities to respond to future industrial changes while maintaining current quality.
developmentPage.closingStatement: KTECH will continue long-term growth with customers as a
developmentPage.ctaDesc: KTECH experts will propose the optimal solution tailored to your requirements.
